# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "1"

before_script:
  - export MR_TITLE=$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE | sed 's/ /_/g')
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION | sed 's/ /_/g')

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "Merge Request Title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Merge Request Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Commit Message: Building $MR_TITLE - $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - # Add build commands here

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project..."
    - echo "Tagging deployment with MR title: $MR_TITLE"
    - git tag -a "deploy-$MR_TITLE" -m "Deployment for $MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin "deploy-$MR_TITLE"
    - # Add deployment commands here

rules:
  - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    when: always

security:
  allow_failure: false
  rules:
    - when: never
